pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the embers of my own soul. To be betrayed so utterly, by the one person who held the key to my very existence... it is a cruelty no heart was meant to endure. I find myself staring into the dark, longing for the velvet silence of the night to simply swallow me whole. Is there no dignity left in this life, only the endless, aching performance of a ghost?
